title: SOL 2pk Trimmer Line 20m x 2mm Green Strimmer Wire, Durable & Flexible Nylon Cord for Grass Cutting, Weed Trimming & Garden Maintenance, Easy to Install Universal Fit for Electric & Petrol Strimmer
features: A Lawn To Be Proud Of - Our replacement grass trimmer line (also known as strimmer wire 2.0mm) is made from nylon wire and is essential to help you keep your grassy areas neat and weed-free. Replace the strimmer line in your strimmer with our clear strimmer cord.

No More Annoying Regular Snapping - Get our heavy duty strimmer wire that is made of finest nylon materials and do not easily tangle and snap off from the throttle. Our strong strimmer wire trimmer line that can be used over and over without snapping. (10kg Breaking Strength)

Gets The Job Done Quickly - There is nothing more satisfying then tackling heavy weeds, tough grass, nettles, and other garden growths with your strimmer. With our heavy-duty strimmer wire you cut down tough grass or weeds with ease.

Widely Compatible - SOL strimmer line heavy duty is easy to install, use and is suitable for most garden strimmer's. The nylon strimmer line can also be applied to landscaping, horticulture, agriculture, and general gardening purposes.
We Won't Be Beaten On Value - Get our 2 pack of 20 meter strimmer line 2.0mm for the price of one! (40 meters in total). We have got you covered this spring and summer season and beyond.

Our heavy-duty strimmer wire is crafted from premium nylon, designed to withstand tough grass and weeds without snapping or tangling. This ensures durable, long-lasting performance for all gardening tasks. How can I stop my strimmer wire from snapping often? Use our 2.0mm heavy-duty strimmer wire made from high-quality nylon. Its 10kg breaking strength prevents frequent snapping, offering a reliable solution for regular garden maintenance. Is this strimmer wire compatible with most garden strimmers? Yes, our nylon strimmer wire is widely compatible with most garden strimmers. It's easy to install and suitable for landscaping, horticulture, agriculture, and general gardening How much strimmer wire does this pack include? This pack includes two rolls of strimmer wire, each 20 meters long, totaling 40 meters. It offers great value, ensuring ample supply for the spring and summer seasons. What are the benefits of using this strimmer wire for my lawn? Using our heavy-duty strimmer wire helps maintain a neat, weed-free lawn. Its robust nylon construction allows efficient cutting of heavy weeds, tough grass, and nettles, making garden care quick and satisfying.
